title: pavonia pseudotyphalaea
intro: Pavonia pseudotyphalaea, also known as Rockrose or Butterfly Weed, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pavonia pseudotyphalaea include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Pavonia pseudotyphalaea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical creams and salves to harness its medicinal benefits.
